dashboard.description: Your AI-powered learning assistant for notes, quizzes, tests, and more.

generate.title: Generate Study Materials
generate.description: Enter any academic topic. LearnMint AI will generate notes, a 30-question quiz, and 20 flashcards, then take you to the Study Hub.
generate.toast.invalidTopicDesc: Topic must be at least 3 characters long.
audioFactory.title: Audio Factory
audioFactory.description: Generate spoken summaries from text, images, or documents, and create audio flashcards.
audioFactory.flashcards.title: Audio Flashcards Generator
audioFactory.flashcards.description: Create flashcards with male & female voice narration.
audioFactory.image.title: Image Audio Summarizer
audioFactory.image.description: Upload an image to get a spoken summary of its content.
audioFactory.pdf.title: PDF Audio Summarizer
audioFactory.pdf.description: Upload a PDF to get a spoken summary of its content.
audioFactory.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Please upload an image under 2MB.
audioFactory.pdfTooLarge: PDF is too large. Please upload a file under 5MB.
audioFactory.pdfExtractError: Could not extract text from the PDF.
audioFactory.discussion.successDesc: The audio discussion is ready to be listened to.
audioFactory.discussion.title: Audio Discussion
audioFactory.audioNotSupported: Your browser does not support the audio element.
audioFactory.text.title: Text Audio Summarizer
audioFactory.text.description: Paste any text to get a brief audio summary.
audioFactory.text.placeholder: Paste an article or notes here (min 50 characters)
audioFactory.text.errorDesc: Please provide at least 50 characters to summarize.
audioFactory.pdf.errorDesc: Please upload and extract text from a PDF first.

quiz.removed.title: Feature Removed
quiz.removed.description: The standalone Quiz Generator has been removed to streamline the app experience.

studyHub.title: Study Hub
studyHub.noTopic.title: No Topic Specified
studyHub.noTopic.description: Please generate study materials from the main "Generate" page first, or select a recent topic from the dashboard.
studyHub.notes.empty: Notes for this topic were generated successfully but appear to be empty.
studyHub.notes.unavailable: No notes available. Try refreshing or generating for a different topic.
studyHub.quiz.empty: Quiz was processed, but no questions were returned for this topic. Try refreshing or a different topic.
studyHub.quiz.unavailable: Quiz data could not be loaded. Please try refreshing.
studyHub.flashcards.empty: Flashcards were processed, but no cards were returned for this topic. Try refreshing or a different topic.

chatbot.gojo.name: Gojo AI
chatbot.holo.name: Holo AI
chatbot.megumin.name: Megumin AI
chatbot.gojo.description: The Honored One is here to help.
chatbot.gojo.greeting: Yo! Took you long enough. I thought I was gonna have to fight off the boredom without you.
chatbot.holo.greeting: Ah, the little one returns. Have you come to bask in my brilliance again?
chatbot.megumin.greeting: Hahahaha! You have sought out the greatest wielder of Explosion magic! What knowledge do you seek from I, Megumin?!
chatbot.megumin.typing: Megumin is concentrating on her spell...
chatbot.gojo.errorMessage: My technique must have fizzled out. Ask again, I wasn't paying attention.
chatbot.holo.errorMessage: My thoughts must have wandered to a distant harvest. Ask again.
chatbot.megumin.errorMessage: My genius... it must be on cooldown! Ask again, and witness true power!
chatbot.gojo.errorToast: Hoh? Something went wrong. Let's try that again.
chatbot.holo.errorToast: Hmph. My wisdom must have been too much for this device. Try again.
chatbot.megumin.errorToast: Waaaah! My mana is out of balance! The spell failed!
chatbot.toast.pdfTruncatedDesc: The provided PDF was long and has been truncated to ensure a timely response.
chatbot.placeholder: Type your message or ask a question...
chatbot.file.image.tooLargeDesc: Please upload an image smaller than 4MB.
chatbot.file.pdf.tooLargeDesc: Please upload a PDF smaller than 10MB.
chatbot.file.pdf.successDesc: {{name}} is ready to be sent with your message.
chatbot.file.pdf.errorDesc: Could not extract text from the PDF.
chatbot.file.unsupportedDesc: Chat supports Image, PDF, audio and video uploads.

news.title: Globale Nieuwsterminal
news.description: Blijf op de hoogte van het laatste nieuws. Filter op trefwoorden, land, categorie en meer.
news.filters.regionSelectDisabledTooltip: Selecteer een land om het Staat/Regio-filter in te schakelen
news.filters.regionTypeDisabledTooltip: Selecteer een land om de zoekopdracht op trefwoord Staat/Regio in te schakelen
news.filters.regionTypeTooltip: Voer staat/regio in om de zoekopdracht te verfijnen
news.filters.cityDisabledTooltip: Selecteer een land om de zoekopdracht op trefwoord Stad in te schakelen
news.filters.cityTooltip: Voer stad in om de zoekopdracht te verfijnen
news.filters.behaviorNote: "Topkoppen" is de standaardcategorie. Als een specifiek land wordt gekozen, kan Staat/Regio een dropdown worden. Termen voor Staat/Regio en Stad verfijnen de zoekopdracht binnen het geselecteerde land indien opgegeven. De standaardtaal is Engels.
news.error.title: Nieuws-API Fout
news.error.message: Fout bij het ophalen van nieuws: {{error}} Dit kan te wijten zijn aan een ongeldige of rate-limited API-sleutel voor Newsdata.io, of een netwerkprobleem. Controleer uw NEWSDATA_API_KEY in uw .env-bestand en zorg ervoor dat deze correct is ingesteld indien geïmplementeerd.
news.noArticles.title: Geen nieuwsartikelen gevonden.
news.noArticles.description: Probeer uw zoekopdracht of filters aan te passen.
news.toast.noHeadlinesDesc: Geen nieuwskoppen beschikbaar om te lezen.
